name: Bæst
teaser: Consistently ranked as the second best pizza in Europe outside Italy. I can't imagine one better.
review: It may be inspired by Neapolitan, but the pizza here is another beast, partly because they're fanatical about sourcing ingredients (like much of Denmark) or are just incredible at making their own. Bæst is consistently ranked as the second best pizza in Europe (outside of Italy), but I can't imagine one better.
headsUp: Everything is house-made and hyper-local. It is a full dining experience.
update: Consistently the best pizza in Europe outside Italy.
